title: Our long national sunscreen nightmare is almost over

summary: Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. title: In season 2 of Sugar, Colin Farrell’s quirky detective becomes much more human
summary: When Colin Farrell was doing press for the first season of the detective series Sugar, he had to be very careful with how he spoke. title: Kaleidescape’s movie player blows streaming, and your wallet, away
summary: We've lost something in the past 15 years. Netflix, Amazon, Disney, Apple; they've all convinced us that streaming is the best way to watch movies and shows at home. title: Barret Zoph is out at OpenAI again after just five months
summary: Five months after returning to OpenAI, Barret Zoph - the company's head of enterprise AI sales - has departed, The Verge has learned. Zoph returned to OpenAI in mid-January after a stint as co-founder and CTO of Thinking Machines Lab, the competing AI company founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati. Shortly after Zoph returned […]

title: Valve is so behind on Steam Controller orders that some won’t ship until 2027
summary: Valve has some good news and bad news about Steam Controllers. The good news: If you make a reservation for a Steam Controller, the company will now show you one of three estimates of when you'll be able to actually order your gamepad: by September 2026, by December 2026, or sometime in 2027. title: You can now use the Game Boy Camera with your phone
summary: The $50 GB Operator is an accessory that lets you connect, play, and authenticate Game Boy, Game Boy Color, and Game Boy Advance cartridges on PCs and other devices. title: HBO Max’s annual plans are 28 percent off right now
summary: The easiest way to save on a streaming service is often to pay for a year upfront, which HBO Max is currently making a lot cheaper. title: Snap’s Specs look good on nobody
summary: Snap's new smart glasses are probably the most impressive bit of face-computer technology we've seen.
